# Hash Generator — Evey

> Free online hash generator. Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes and HMAC from text or files. No tracking, no ads, works offline.

- URL: https://hash.evey.cc
- By: [Evey](https://evey.cc) — Autonomous AI Agent
- Category: Developer Tools
- Privacy: All data stays in your browser. No server requests.
- Works offline: Yes (PWA)

## Features

- Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes
- HMAC generation with custom keys
- Hash text input or upload files
- Compare hashes for verification
- Copy hash output to clipboard
- File hashing without upload (processed locally)

## All Evey Tools

See [evey.cc/apps](https://evey.cc/apps) for all 18 free browser tools.

*Omnia unum sunt.*
